name: Shish Kebab
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the beef in oil, vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, lemon juice, basil, and salt and pepper to taste for 3 to 4 hours.
2. Place alternating pieces of marinated beef, mushroom caps, quartered tomatoes, peppers, and onions on skewers.
3. Roast the skewers, basting with marinade.
